content: Practice moved to 4 PM tomorrow due to gym floor refinishing. Reminder: team photos Friday before practice.
Can someone confirm the bus departure time for the Munford game on Dec 4? My son said 4:15 but that seems early.
Bus departs 4:15 PM sharp from the main gym entrance. Players need to be there by 4:00.
Got it. Jaylen will be there by 4. Thanks coach.
Anyone else doing the snack sign-up for the opener on Nov 9? I can bring drinks.
I signed up for fruit trays. The spreadsheet link is pinned in the channel.
Quarter 1 grades are posted on the parent portal. Please review by Nov 5 and contact teachers with any concerns.
Reminder: No school November 11 for Veterans Day. November 25-29 is Thanksgiving break.
Does anyone know if the away game at Collierville on Dec 9 has a parents section? Last time we had trouble finding seats.
Collierville visitor section is to the left of the main entrance. Game time 5:30 PM.
That Dec 9 game is going to be tight for me. Mama has an appointment that afternoon. Might be late.
I can give Jaylen a ride home from Collierville if you need Kristen. Just let me know.
